name: USQualityCoreConditionEncounterDiagnosis
title: US Quality Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis
description: The US Quality Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile is based upon the US Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile.   In version 5.0.0, the US Quality Core Condition Profile has been split into the US Quality Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile and US Quality Core Condition Problems and Health Concerns Profile. To promote interoperability and adoption through consistent implementation, this profile defines constraints and extensions on the Condition resource for the minimal set of data to record, search, and retrieve information about an encounter diagnosis.  It defines the core set of elements and extensions for quality rule and measure authors.
copyright: Used by permission of HL7 International, all rights reserved Creative Commons License

element.short: Date the condition was first asserted
element.definition: The date on which the existence of the Condition was first asserted or acknowledged.
element.comment: The assertedDate is in the context of the recording practitioner and might not be the same as the recordedDate.

element.short: active | recurrence | relapse | inactive | remission | resolved
element.definition: The clinical status of the condition.
element.comment: The data type is CodeableConcept because clinicalStatus has some clinical judgment involved, such that there might need to be more specificity than the required FHIR value set allows. For example, a SNOMED coding might allow for additional specificity.

element.short: unconfirmed | provisional | differential | confirmed | refuted | entered-in-error
element.definition: The verification status to support the clinical status of the condition.

binding.description: A category assigned to the condition.

element.definition: A subjective assessment of the severity of the condition as evaluated by the clinician.

element.short: (USCDI+ Quality) Identification of the condition, problem or diagnosis
element.definition: Identification of the condition, problem or diagnosis.

element.short: (USCDI+ Quality) Encounter created as part of
(USCDI+ Quality) Estimated or actual date, date-time, or age
(USCDI+ Quality) Date record was first recorded
element.definition: The recordedDate represents when this particular Condition record was created in the system, which is often a system-generated date.
